rule: one bottleneck, one test, one metric

experiments.bottleneck: visitors may not understand the audit value fast enough
experiments.hypothesis: a sharper headline will increase audit requests
experiments.target: first measurable improvement after public launch

experiments.bottleneck: buyers need trust before clicking setup offer
experiments.hypothesis: adding a clear no-guarantee and process block improves trust
experiments.target: first measurable improvement after public launch

experiments.hypothesis: one focused channel beats many scattered channels
